constitution.article_ii_agent_authority: PASS - story draft validation performed by @po authority
constitution.article_iii_story_driven: PASS - target story exists in docs/stories
constitution.article_iv_no_invention: BLOCK - story is not self-contained enough and has unresolved source conflict
constitution.article_v_quality_first: BLOCK - quality gates not run because draft validation blocked before implementation readiness

notes: Community Origin optional section is absent, acceptable for internal story.
CodeRabbit skip notice is present and matches disabled configuration.
executor and quality_gate are present and different.
Assignment is broadly consistent with code/features/logic, but story includes database and integration work that may need split executor ownership.

issues: Scope combines too many independent implementation areas in one story.
Concrete schemas, endpoints, files, event contracts, and dependency order are not summarized in the story.
References point mostly to whole documents instead of exact sections/tasks.
Developer must read the full Sales PRD/SPEC/tasklist to implement safely.
Acceptance criteria are too broad to verify without external decomposition.
Test files, fixtures, and validation steps are not mapped to specific acceptance criteria.

blocking_issues: Story scope is too large; source tasklist already separates this into SA-V01..SA-V07, SA-D01..SA-D02, SA-C01..SA-C04, SA-A01, and TASK-SA01..TASK-SA18.
Source conflict for deal.closed initial partner state: DOCUMENTO_GERAL section 11.2 says onboarding, TASK-SA18 says prospect.
Dev Notes are not self-contained enough to satisfy No Invention for implementation.
File locations are broad path groups rather than task-to-file mappings.
should_fix_issues: Split or narrow the story into implementable increments.
Map each acceptance criterion to exact source tasks and verification steps.
Add security and integration constraints from DOCUMENTO_GERAL.
Clarify Arva slot names versus PRD agent names.
next_action: Return to @sm *draft or @pm to split/refine the story and resolve the deal.closed source conflict.
